violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the second door of the walk-in cooler in front of the deli meat and cheeses. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the fan guards in the walk-in cooler and the shelving and racks in the walk-in cooler and the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025
The hand-washing sink in the back storage area was blocked by a box and a rolling cart. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

Egg Rolls was observed held at 92 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC was notified and products were reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the fan guards in the walk-in cooler and the shelving and racks in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024
